description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage containing two jobs. The build:linux job runs on the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/cfmm/dcmproxy/image:latest, executes "mkdir build/", "cd build", "cmake ../DicomProxy", and "make", stores the resulting build/DicomProxy as an artifact, and runs only for tag pipelines. The build:macos job runs on runners tagged macOS and xcode_9.0, executes "carthage bootstrap", "xcodebuild clean -project DcmProxy.xcodeproj -scheme DcmProxy", "xcodebuild archive -project DcmProxy.xcodeproj -scheme DcmProxy -archivePath build", "xcodebuild -exportArchive -archivePath build.xcarchive/ -exportPath build/ -exportOptionsPlist export.plist", and "hdiutil create -volname DcmProxy -srcfolder build -ov -format UDZO \"DcmProxy-${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}.dmg\"", stores the generated DcmProxy-${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}.dmg as an artifact, and also runs only for tag pipelines.
